name: Coconut Praline Dream Pie
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup chopped pecans, walnuts or almonds
1/3 cup firmly packed light brown sugar
2 envelopes dream whip whipped topping mix
2 packages (4 servings) vanilla flavor instant pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, heat pecans, butter and brown sugar until the butter and sugar are melted and the mixture comes to a boil.
2. Boil for exactly 30 seconds.
3. Spread the mixture on the bottom of the cooled pastry shell.
4. Allow it to cool completely.
1. In a large bowl, beat the whipped topping mix, 1 cup of cold milk, and vanilla with an electric mixer on high speed until thickened and forms peaks.
2. Add the remaining 1 3/4 cups of cold milk and pudding mixes; blend on low speed.
3. Beat for 2 minutes, scraping the bowl occasionally.
4. Stir in 1 cup of coconut.
5. Pour the mixture into the pastry shell.
6. Refrigerate for at least 4 hours or until set.
7. Garnish with the remaining coconut.
8. Store leftover pie in the refrigerator. Makes 8 servings.
